description:
Receipt issued to Abū l-Ḥasan b. Wahb for his ḍamān on dyeing in Madīnat al-Fayyūm and for the appointed treasurers. Dated: end of Jumādā I 402 (29 December 1011 CE) according to Bondioli, Luescher, Rustow, and Vanthieghem (Khan reads 403). Written by the jahbadh Mīkhāʾīl b. ʿAbd al-Masīḥ. Amount: one dīnār exactly (Khan reads 3 and a half and a sixteenth). Verso is blank.

Prior description: Receipt from the archive of Abū l-Ḥasan b. Wahb. Written by Mīkhāʾīl b. ʿAbd al-Masīḥ, the cashier, and registered by the Office of Accounts on behalf of the Office of Supervision: Abū l-Ḥasan b. Wahb has paid the sum of 3 and a half and a sixteenth (dirhams?) for the estates in Al-Fayyūm, under the supervision of the judge Thiqat al-Mulk Makīn al-Dawla wa-Amīnuhā, of the protégé of the commander of the faithful Abū l-Ḥasan ʿAlī b. Bahār, and the accountant Abū l-Sarī Theodor b. Yuḥannis. Dated 13 Jumādā II, 403 AH (= December 1012 CE). (same as T-S AS 184.45). (information from CUDL)
description_he: קבלה שהונפקה לאבו אל-חסן בן והב על ערבותו לצביעה במדינת אל-פיום ולגזברים הממונים. מתוארכת: סוף ג'מאדה א' 402 (29 דצמבר 1011 לספירה). נכתב על ידי הג'הבד' מיכאל בן עבד אל-מסיח. סכום: דינר אחד בדיוק. גב ריק. (מידע מתוך CUDL)
